news_bbc.title: Virgin Media fined £28m for preventing customers from cancelling contracts
news_bbc.summary: Millions of phone calls from customers were "likely mishandled" over nearly a three-year period, the regulator says.

news_bbc.title: Hundreds of jobs at risk as John Lewis plans to cut some services
news_bbc.summary: No final decision has been made but the job cuts will happen in the autumn if the redundancy plans are approved.

news_bbc.title: From mouthwash to hair dye: How weight-loss jabs are changing shopping habits
news_bbc.summary: The BBC looks at how spending habits have shifted as users report feeling less hungry.

news_bbc.title: Trains and emergency calls affected after major outage at Australia's largest telecoms company
news_bbc.summary: Servers at data centres in Sydney and Melbourne were to blame but the exact cause remains unknown.

news_bbc.title: Victims of 23andMe data breach to get $47m payout, judge rules
news_bbc.summary: 23andMe compiles genetic profiles of people through DNA testing kits, but it was heavily criticised after a 2023 hack.

news_bbc.title: Airbnb data identifies illegal social home sublets
news_bbc.summary: Nearly 6,000 social homes are thought to be illegally listed on short-term rental platforms.

news_bbc.title: Australia dock workers call for 28-hour week in AI talks
news_bbc.summary: A union says workers are "in the crosshairs" of automation as AI is being tested across ports.

news_bbc.title: Dubai and Egypt package holidays cheaper to lure customers back
news_bbc.summary: Family deals to many non-European destinations are cheaper this summer than last, as travel nerves have slowed bookings.
